(sample-wlc) [mynode] #show configuration effective
ap-group "HQ-AP"
    virtual-ap "corp-vap"
    virtual-ap "guest-vap"
!
wlan virtual-ap "corp-vap"
    ssid-profile "corp-ssid-profile"
    aaa-profile "corp-aaa"
    vlan 20
    forward-mode tunnel
!
wlan virtual-ap "guest-vap"
    ssid-profile "guest-ssid-profile"
    aaa-profile "guest-aaa"
    vlan 30
    forward-mode tunnel
!
wlan ssid-profile "corp-ssid-profile"
    essid "CORP"
    opmode wpa2-aes
!
wlan ssid-profile "guest-ssid-profile"
    essid "GUEST"
    opmode opensystem
!
aaa profile "corp-aaa"
    initial-role "logon"
    dot1x-default-role "corp-employee"
    dot1x-server-group "CPPM-CORP"
!
aaa profile "guest-aaa"
    initial-role "guest-logon"
    mac-default-role "guest-logon"
    mac-server-group "CPPM-GUEST"
!
user-role "logon"
    access-list session "logon-control"
!
user-role "corp-employee"
    access-list session "corp-acl" position 1
    vlan 40
!
user-role "guest-logon"
    access-list session "guest-logon-acl"
!
interface vlan 30
    ip address 10.30.0.1 255.255.255.0
!
interface vlan 40
    ip address 10.40.0.254 255.255.255.0
!
ip access-list session "logon-control"
    any any svc-dhcp permit
    any any svc-dns permit
!
ip access-list session "corp-acl"
    any network 10.0.0.0 255.0.0.0 any deny
    any network 172.16.0.0 255.240.0.0 any deny
    any network 192.168.0.0 255.255.0.0 any deny
    any any svc-dns permit
    any any any src-nat
!
ip access-list session "guest-logon-acl"
    user any svc-dhcp permit
    user any svc-dns permit
    user alias controller svc-https dst-nat 8081
    user any svc-http dst-nat 8080
!
netdestination "controller"
    host 10.10.10.1
    network 10.10.20.0 255.255.255.0
!
